text: So, this is the conclusion, siddhanta, last instruction
ataeva maya-moha chadi' buddhiman. One who is intelligent, really intelligent, should give up this maya-moha.
Hmm. nitya-tattva krishna-bhakti koruna sandhan, sadhya vastu krishna-prema - krishna-bhakti, paramartha - for which this life is meant, he should inquire about it.
He should take all such care; how can I develop this krishna-bhakti?
Hm. This maya-moha, what is this moha, delusion? It says in English - delusion, illusion-delusion, illusion, both illusion and delusion.
Hmm. In the fifth canto of Shrimad Bhagavatam, it is stated and Bhagavad-gita also states, moha, attachment towards this so-called relationship. Hmm. relationship
pumsah striya mithuni-bhavam etam tayor mitho hridaya-granthim ahuh ato griha-kshetra-sutapta-vittair janasya moho yam aham mameti. It is said, janasya moho yam aham mameti,
I and mine. Hmm. What is the base of this material world?
pumsah striya mithuni-bhavam etam, Bhagavata says,
fifth canto of Shrimad Bhagavatam. This is the base of the material world, pumsah striya mithuni-bhavam etam. This is based on the maithuna of purusha and stri.
Male and female union - maithuna, sexual enjoyment, sexual union.
This material world is based on it. This is the base of the material world, nothing else. pumsah striya mithuni-bhavam etam tayor mitho hridaya-granthim ahuh
and they unite, a very hard knot, granthi means knot, a very, very hard, very strong knot is there in the heart.
It is very difficult to break. This durja-grha-khalo yadustajya svajanam arca patham ca hitva.

It is very difficult to give it up, dustyaja, means give it up, very difficult to give it up - this attachment, false attachment. Real attachment towards Krishna, but we are so much attached to these false things - temporary things.
Bhaktivinoda describes in his song - it is very difficult - ya dustyaja - it is very difficult to give it up
Hmm. the tie, bondage of this husband and wife, bondage, Hmm. so strong - hard knot to break
stated. Hmm. pumsah striya mithuni-bhavam etam tayor mitho hridaya-granthim ahuh ato griha-kshetra-sutapta-vittair janasya moho yam aham mameti
When male and female, related as husband and wife, united, the first thing required is griha
a house is required, isnt it? You have not yet got a house, so she is lameting. griha is required first.
You may be, when you were alone, staying anywhere. Sleeping on someone's veranda. With a wife, a house is required. First requirement, now it expands
griha. ato griha, then comes kshetra - some land and property for maintenance is required - ato griha, kshetra - then suta, children are born - progeny.
And the wife always desires to have children. If the wife is devoid of children, that is misery for her. "Oh, I married this man, no children are coming out.
You see. These are all these desires. Wifes desire. ato griha, kshetra, suta. Then apta, then vittaih - apta means these so-called relatives.
Stri, the Sanskrit word stri
You follow, the sanskrit word stri, bharya, wife, it says stri. The Sanskrit root stri means that expands;
it is the literary meaning - that which expands. Stri expands. Stri means expand. You are one, you become two.
Then children came out - three, four, five. Then son-in-law, father-in-law, daughter-in-law, so many expansions going on, going on, going on, going on. Isnt it?
The wife expands, stri.
ato griha, kshetra, suta, apta, apta means - so-called friends, relatives, expansions, vittaih
vittaih means material wealth, material property. ato griha-kshetra-sutapta-vittair janasya moho yam aham mameti, says this is all mine - aham mameti, aham mameti, I and mine.

This wife is mine. Children are mine. This family is mine. This griha is mine. This kshetra is mine. This land and property is mine, this land is mine, this country is mine, these friends are mine - everything belongs to me
I and mine - this is moha. Janasya moho yam aham mameti, this I and mine, this is janasya moham, this is delusion. One should give it up.
Really, all these things belong to Krishna
nothing is belongs to you.
Buddhiman loka - one who is really intelligent, he should know. Then therefore Bhaktivinoda Thakura says ataeva maya-moha chadi buddhiman, he is really intelligent - he gives up this maya-moha.
Arjuna was first lamenting, "No, I wont kill, these are my kith and kin, blood relationships, related to this body, my superiors, guru-janas, my friends, so-called friends, my sons
my father-in-law, all these brother-in-laws, all these family members. How can he kill them?
You see, they are lamenting, just thinking of their killing, thinking of the death is so much pain
pain in his heart. He told, "No, I cant fight, Oh Krishna, I cant fight." gandivam sramsate hastat tvak caiva paridahyate na ca shaknomy avasthatum bhramativa ca me manah
Krishna is prompting him. fight, fight, fight, uttishtha, yuddhaya krita-nishcayah. you Arjuna, you are such a weak-hearted fellow.
how have you developed this weakness of heart? This is weakness of heart, you get up and fight. He says, "No Krishna, I cant fight.
tvak caiva paridahyate, bhramativa ca me manah, my head is reeling, I cannot stand up. How can I fight? I cant fight. You see, This is lamentation. This is the result of moha. Moha - delusion
When we listen to Krishna, Bhagavad Gita,
completely surrendering himself - shishyas te ham shadhi mam tvam prapannam - karpanya-doshopahata-svabhavah pricchami tvam dharma-sammudha-cetah.
I cannot think of what is real duty. What is my duty? Dharma-sammudha-cetah - karpanya-doshopahata-svabhavah. You see - lamenting, he is bewildered.
I am bewildered. I cant think of what is my duty - what should be done? Krishna is saying, prompting him to fight - he says no - this is not good
Why such dreadful fighting? Just thinking - this is the wickedness, mana tumi bada dusta, prompting the wicked mind
like this - this moha - this is the result of this moha. Therefore, shishyas te ham shadhi mam tvam prapannam, at last this is the right course, come to this right path,
shishyas te ham shadhi mam tvam prapannam. He knows everything, he is my friend, Krishna sakha he knows everything - so I become your disciple.
I come under your discipline. You just inflict discipline unto me. shadhi mam, inflict discipline - give instructions, tattva upadesha. Give me tattva upadesha

That's the meaning of shadhi. I become your disciple. Guru gives tattva upadesha. Which is very beneficial - shreya. He knows. He knows krishna-tattva, yei krishna-tattva-vetta, sei guru haya, Mahaprabhu says
knows krishna-tattva, he knows everything, hell give Krishna - tattva upadesha. Then your miseries will be mitigated. This moha, delusion will go.
heard, then he said yes, nashto mohah smritir labdha tvat-prasadan mayacyuta sthito smi gata-sandehah karishye vacanam tava. Oh Acyuta, Ah Krishna,
tvat-prasa is a mercy, prasad means mercy, kripa - my delusion is gone now, moha is annihilated now
Yes, I and mine, it is gone. Everything belongs to you. I am... I belong to you.
amar bolite kichu nahi, there is nothing I can say is mine. No, everything belongs to you.
I can learn now. Very clearly. I can understand it. I am fully convinced. nashto moha.
So guru, the spiritual master, the real guru, pure devotee, krishna-tattva-vetta, coming in bonafide disciplic succession, pure Vaisnava

he gives tattva upadesha, then this moha is annihilated, nashto moha. smritir labdha tvat-prasadan mayacyuta sthito smi gata-sandehah. All the doubts are cleared. Sarva-samshayah Sancheta? This is one of the qualifications of the guru, guru-tattva
he can dispel all sorts of doubts of the disciple, all sorts of doubts, not a slightest doubt will be there. Sansayatma vinasyati - if there is slightest doubt, he will perish
Wherever doubt arises in your mind, bring it to your guru, spiritual master and dispel it
Dont concoct. Dont compromise. Dont manufacture. Dont listen to anybody else. Youll perish.
Only I'll listen to one body. I have accepted, I have, shishyas te ham shadhi mam tvam prapannam, I have fully surrendered myself
purnatma nivedana. I have done, I have accepted. Ill only listen to him. Whatever he says, I will accept. Nobody else. Isnt it? They will make you bewildered.
Dont listen. Anytime, any moment, any doubt arises, bring it to
your spiritual master. Listen to him. He is guru, he is able - sarva-samshayah sanchati? able to dispel all sorts of doubts.
And make the disciple fully convinced.

nashto mohah smritir labdha tvat-prasadan maya sthito smi gata-sandehah. Sandeha means doubts - all doubts are cleared now. And fully convinced - karishye vacanam tava. As Krishna says now you do whatever you like - yathecchasi tatha kuru
all your doubts are cleared. Then do whatever you like.
Independence is granted, it is not forced, no compulsion, there is no question of compulsion. Krishna has never forced, never compulsion
If there is compulsion, if there is force, there is no question of love, no question of love. You see,
there is no question of love. Therefore independence is granted, the minute independence is granted, yathecchasi tatha kuru - you do as you like.
You see, if there is compulsion, if there is forcing, no question of love. There is no love.
So therefore independence has been given
otherwise there is no question of love will arise.
Therefore Krishna says, yathecchasi tatha kuru, you now do whatever you like. Fully convinced. na karishye vacanam tava, Ill fight and kill what you desire. I'll carry out your order
whatever you say - this is the disciple and spiritual master relationship - guru-shishya sambandha - based on a loving relationship.
Guru never compels, guru never forces, guru says everything
dispels all such doubts of the disciple - should be convinced - not a tinge of doubt will be there - now you will do whatever you like.
thats the process - and an intelligent disciple like Arjuna says, "No Guru Maharaja whatever you say Ill do. I have no other thought." This is the proper use of independence,
when one takes shelter, when one surrenders himself completely to the lotus feet of guru
no other thought - no other thought - guru-mukha-padma-vakya, cittete-koribo-aikya, ar-na-koriho-mane-asa what gurudeva says that should be carried out
I must do what Krishna desires. What Krishna desires just comes through guru. Guru is his representative - acaryam mam vijaniyan - he is prakasha vigraha
Krishna's desire comes through lips of a guru
guru says that karishye, I have to do - may be very unfavorable, is very unfavorable on the part of Arjuna to kill his kith and kin but he did it - this is love. This is true love, pure love.
One business - to please Krishna - it's true love - it's true love
Let all my so-called friends leave me. I don't care, but I cannot leave Krishna.
I cannot leave my guru, spiritual master,
I can't leave.
I have now clear-cut vision. I am fully convinced - this is the goal of life to be achieved - to please Krishna
Ataeva maya-moha chadi buddhiman nitya-tattva krishna-bhakti koruna sandhan. This is buddhiman.
why are you cherishing this doubt? Dushta mana? Wicked mind.. Chant Hare Krishna
the eastern horizon looks red. Isnt it? Darkness is gradually vanishing
ratri-cala, The animals, the owls, the thieves, dacoits, they are leaving. It's getting brighter, brighter, brighter but the sun has not yet risen. Not yet risen.
It is purvabhasa - You understand? - the previous symptom that the sun is getting up - its rising.
Similarly, namabhasa, pure name has not yet risen - pure name shuddha.
you understand? But the sadhaka who is doing sadhana under the guidance of guru, being conscious of the offences,
is trying to getting rid of the offences one after another
saying towards his son - uttering the name of his son - but the very name is the name of God, Narayana, therefore when we name our children, we name after God
Krishna, Hari, Narayana, Madhusudana, like that
if we have attachment towards family, son - let it come up at the time of death, at least we will get liberation stage - that namabhasa, as Ajamila achieved - such a great sinner - maha-papi
there is one offence - nama-bala-papa-buddhi - one of the ten offences - nama-aparadha - nama-bala-papa-buddhi, committing papa sin
at the dint of chanting nama, isnt it? He didnt commit that offence
if someone deliberately - "Oh, I have got a weapon, a very good weapon now
one name of Krishna will annihilate all sorts of past sins of crores of lives.
Sin - reactions to sinful activities - Oh, I have got a very good weapon - now I'll chant Hare Krishna -all papa
will be annihilated, reactions - then again commit more papa, then again Ill chant, then annihilated - this nama-bala-papa-buddhi
if you have this attitude then you are committing offence - it is inexcusable - this cannot be excused, You understand? one should not have this
Ajamila had no such attitude because
calling his son - he achieved this stage of namabhasa. No offence.
Namabhasa means offences are not completely gone. If offences will completely go, then pure name will rise, sun will arise, moon will rise, then prema will come
many good results are there if you achieve namabhasa stage - namabhasa nashta haya acha papa jata - all the papa, all the sinful activity, reactions of all sins
thats a fact, definitely.
You'll never go to a doctor - you'll never pay a doctors fee
amoha-avyakta - most effective, it will never be ineffective,
all diseases, because diseases are caused by prarabdha-karma - when prarabdha-karma is annihilated - where is the question of disease?
Why will diseases come? Namabhasi sarva-rista haya shanti paya - all the aristas, all the anarthas go away
Arista means anarthas, anarthas - all bad, bad things
manda-graha - evil planets. Shani-graha, Rahu-graha - they go to the astrologer to see their horoscope - so you please astrologer, see if good fortune is coming or some bad is coming

we never go because we have taken shelter of Harinama - it will annihilate all aristas, all manda-graha, all prarabdha-karma, everything gone - why? why are you going? Have complete faith in the name - take shelter, complete shelter
automatically. According to prarabdha-karma, reaction of prarabdha-karma, your horoscope says you will die,
So astrologer says this man has already dead, died, oh, hes surviving - how strange?
he was dragged to hell, Ajamila, no? Hes liberated, hes free from the clutches of Yamaduta
Abhasa - nama abhasa - namaabhasa. Abhasa means symptom
Symptom - it shows that the name is rising - it shows that the sun is rising
I give the example of the sun - before I see - the eastern horizon - becomes red

Darkness gradually vanishes - it's getting brighter, brighter - the owls, the thieves, the dacoits, those who are ratri-cela... wandering during the dark night, they are going, fleeing, fleeing, fleeing.
you understand? Similarly, all these are going
The beauty of Krishhna surpasses the beauty of crores of Cupids
Brahma-samhita says - adyam puranam bhushnam - navayauvana - Hes always fresh young, Krishna
and how to do bhajana?
That navina madan, New Cupid, Aprakrita Madan, Madan Cupid which is non-material
aprakrita - I word this, I use this word, Sanskrit word prakrita means material, aprakrita means opposite, immaterial or spiritual
Krishna is aprakrita navina-madana... Kama-bija kama-gayatri tara-upasana, those who have developed bhava stage, going up to prema stage, they have been awarded Kama-gayatri
is superior to the so-called Brahmana - varnashrama-dharma: Brahmana
shudra, vaishya, kshatriya, Brahmana, but Vaishnava-Brahmana is not that Brahmana. That Brahmana is in the sattva stage, this is material stage,
it requires much more time to explain it, I have no language to explain it, it is very, very deep.
The question is so short, the answer is very, very deep.
So by chanting Hare Krishna Maha-mantra, those who have achieved namabhasa stage and are just progressing - they are given gayatri - they are given gayatri
